emit._note: CoreWriter sendRawAction(bytes): data[0]=0x01 version, data[1:4]=action_id (uint24 BE), data[4:]=abi.encode(action args). action 11 (cancel by cloid) maps to a structured Perp(CancelOrder) body; every other action + default maps to hyperliquid_core::hl_unknown carrying a descriptive action_type (e.g. 'vaultTransfer') so a policy can gate the specific CoreWriter op by name. Structured-with-amounts is deferred: the args are HL uint64 fixed-point (token/asset are L1 ids, amounts need per-asset szDecimals/weiDecimals scaling) which the declarative grammar cannot scale without an HL meta snapshot; mislabeling a raw integer as a human amount would be worse than hl_unknown. See ~/.claude-web3/plans/hl-corewriter-cover.md for the grounded per-action decision (perp struct types vs HL raw uint fixed-point; no matching domain for vault/staking/delegate/transfer/permission ops).

1.name: limit_order
1.inputs_abi: (uint32 asset, bool isBuy, uint64 limitPx, uint64 sz, bool reduceOnly, uint8 encodedTif, uint128 cloid)
1._note: PlaceLimitOrderAction needs symbol:String (asset=uint32 number), side:PerpSide-enum (isBuy=bool), price:Decimal-String (limitPx=uint64 number), size.amount:U256-String (sz=uint64 number), time_in_force:TimeInForce-enum (encodedTif=uint8), plus live_inputs with no perp catalog default — none expressible declaratively from HL fixed-point ints. Unknown is the honest mapping.

6.name: spot_send
6._note: token/wei are uint64 L1 identifiers (not EVM address/U256), so token.erc20_transfer would mislabel. Kept Unknown.

10.name: cancel_order_by_oid
10._note: Same semantics as action 11 but oid is uint64 (renders as JSON number); CancelOrderAction.order_id is a String which rejects a number. Unknown. (action 11 cloid=uint128 renders as string and maps structurally.)

11.name: cancel_order_by_cloid
11._note: Structured Perp(CancelOrder): cloid is uint128 (renders as JSON string), accepted by order_id:String. PerpVenue::Hyperliquid{chain} exists, CancelOrderAction has no live_inputs. The one CoreWriter action that maps cleanly to a perp domain body.

13.name: send_asset
13.inputs_abi: (address destination, address subAccount, uint32 source_dex, uint32 destination_dex, uint64 token, uint64 wei)

15.name: borrow_lend_operation
15._note: HL native borrow/lend, but token/wei are uint64 L1 identifiers and encodedOperation (0=Supply,1=Withdraw) is a uint8 not a lending action tag — does not fit the lending domain (TokenRef address + U256 amount). Unknown.

default.name: unrecognized_action
default._note: Fail-soft fallback for version mismatch / unknown action_id / future action 16+. Raw call preserved via $calldata.
